name: How long does workers comp process take for neck injury in Utah?
description: Weeks for start, months for settlement.

mainEntity.name: How long does workers comp process take for neck injury in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Weeks for start, months for settlement.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Initial benefits 14-30 days if undisputed; full resolution 6-18 months with hearings.** Varies by complexity.[1] Key factors: Delays from denials, IMEs; appeals add time. Track status weekly. Lawyer speeds via negotiation.
